recs.s: URGENT: All 4 codex production runs fail. Entrypoint script unsets OPENAI_API_KEY/CODEX_API_KEY from /proc/1/environ but provider retry has no key. Model gpt-5.5 returns invalid_request_error — pin to a real model (gpt-4.1, gpt-5, or whatever the codex-cli release ships). Yesterday's fix attempt only changed the symptom (gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07 → gpt-5.5).
Changeset Generator uses api-proxy:10000 with model gpt-5.4-mini — different code path. Verify whether internal proxy still exists or model is registered.
Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer single-run cost $8.54, 12M tokens, 129 turns — 43% of daily spend. Either scope grew or agent loops. Inspect tool-call sequence.
Smoke CI still cancelled (1/5 today). Persistent across 3 days. Raise timeout or move noop emission earlier in flow.
Smoke Pi blocks 20/20 (100%) at api-proxy:10002. Either allowlist or remove probe.
PR Sous Chef turn count varies 0-18 across 4 runs today. Investigate whether prompt or task shape is unstable.
13 GitHub list_issues/search_issues calls filtered by DIFC integrity policy. Verify all agents handle the filtered result gracefully (not infinite-loop on missing data).
Carryover: telemetry export endpoint. Not seen in today's logs but worth confirming sentry-ingest flow remains healthy.
Carryover: previous 60KB limit. Today's writes fit but raise to 100KB to give headroom.
